zh.lifeSummary: 當Susan De Legh於1334年出生在英國藍卡爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Robert Legh28歲，母親Matilda Maude Norley26歲。她於1350年之前與William de  Radcliffe結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1410年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susan De Legh于1334年出生在英国藍卡爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Robert Legh28岁，母亲Matilda Maude Norley26岁。她于1350年之前与William de  Radcliffe结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1410年在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾希頓 武安德 林享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Susan De Legh was born in 1334, in Adlington, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert Legh, was 28 and her mother, Matilda Maude Norley, was 26. She married William de  Radcliffe before 1350. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1410, in Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

Elle a épousé William de  Radcliffe avant 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1410, à Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susan De Legh 1334 in Adlington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Legh 28 und ihre Mutter Matilda Maude Norley 26. ko.Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Susan De Legh(이)가 1334년 영국 랭카실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Legh(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Maude Norley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1350년 이전 William de  Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susan De Legh nasceu em 1334, em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Legh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Maude Norley, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William de  Radcliffe antes 1350. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1410, em Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susan De Legh родилась в 1334 г. в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Legh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Maude Norley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de  Radcliffe перед 1350 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1410 г. в местности аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susan De Legh nació en 1334, en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Legh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Matilda Maude Norley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William de  Radcliffe antes de 1350. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1410, en Ashton Under Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
